merges.pr_title: fix(editor): suppress stale google_disabled warning when /auth/config says Google is enabled
merges.summary_vi: The CMS/Editor login modal showed **"Đăng nhập Google đang tắt."** purely from a stale `?auth_error=google_disabled` URL param. `init()` displayed that warning **blindly on page load, before consulting `/auth/config`** —

merges.pr_title: feat(auth): Google/Gmail login for CMS with dual-provider rollout

merges.pr_title: feat(images): SEOMONEY owned-image fallback chain, drop external stock images
